description: Retrieve references to a specific network.

children.name: referenceCount
children.description: Number of references of this type

children.name: references
children.description: List of references, present only if resourceType has API model defined

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}/references", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Network References
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}/references"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}/references", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Network References
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}/references"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
